mission: To provide innovative technology solutions that empower underserved communities through accessible digital tools and services.
description: We are a Black-owned technology and general contracting firm based in Rialto, CA focused on smart home integration, commercial renovations, and community development projects.
use_of_funds_template: Funds will be used to expand our team, purchase equipment, invest in marketing, and scale operations to serve more clients across Southern California and beyond.
past_projects: Commercial renovation of 15,000 sq ft retail space
Smart home installations for 50+ residential clients
Community Wi-Fi infrastructure project serving 200 residents
